source: local release manifests, public store snapshots, and YouTube playlist manifests

releases.title: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
releases.distrokid_status: submitted and public on verified stores for the title-track release
releases.store_status: Spotify, Apple Music, iTunes, and YouTube Music verified for the public title-track release; additional album/store links still need public verification as they appear.
notes: Remastered YouTube album videos are public and ordered in the album playlist.
Spotify for Artists metrics still require manual export or connected analytics access.

releases.title: Twelve Dollars
releases.distrokid_status: uploaded/prepared from local masters; public streaming links still need verification when stores expose them
releases.store_status: YouTube remaster and album playlist are public; Spotify, Apple Music, and DistroKid/HyperFollow public links are pending verification.
releases.primary_cta: YouTube playlist until store links are verified
notes: Twelve Dollars title video was replaced with updated art and remastered local audio.
The old title video is unlisted and marked archived.
Playlist image was set to the approved Twelve Dollars cover.

releases.title: Analog Myth
releases.distrokid_status: submitted to DistroKid for July 1 release and remastered audio downloaded locally
releases.store_status: YouTube remaster album playlist is public; Spotify, Apple Music, and other DistroKid store links are pending public verification.
releases.primary_cta: YouTube playlist until July 1 store links are verified
notes: DistroKid/Mixea 24-bit/48k WAV masters are stored in audio-distrokid-remastered.
All eight Analog Myth YouTube videos were remastered, uploaded, and the originals were archived as unlisted.
Album order is 13, Girls Camp, Analog Myth, Spilling the Tea, No Mortgage, Guards Down, Slow Walk, The Power of Light.

open_checks: Verify Twelve Dollars public Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music release, and HyperFollow links when DistroKid exposes them.
Verify Analog Myth public Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music release, and HyperFollow links on or after 2026-07-01.
Keep Amazon Music pending until a public URL is found from DistroKid or direct store search.
